summary: Tested AI-assisted booking feature for ZONT VTC platform. All backend API tests passed (9/9). Frontend UI tests passed: AI block visible with sparkle icon, input, AUTO button; form fields filled correctly by AI; Enter key triggers parse; mobile responsive at 390px width; toast notifications working.
critical_code_review_comments: Google Maps Autocomplete deprecation warning: As of March 1st, 2025, google.maps.places.Autocomplete is not available to new customers. Consider migrating to google.maps.places.PlaceAutocompleteElement in the future.
seed_data_creation: None required - AI endpoint uses real Gemini Flash LLM
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI booking feature fully tested. POST /api/booking/ai-parse endpoint uses Gemini Flash via emergentintegrations with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Response time is 1-3 seconds. Frontend AI block has data-testid='ai-booking-block', 'ai-text-input', 'ai-auto-btn'. Form fields are filled via React state which syncs to PlacesAutocomplete via useEffect. Toast notifications use sonner library.

POST /api/booking/ai-parse - airport code expansion (ORY -> Orly) - PASSED
